title: anisomeles inodora
intro: Anisomeles inodora, also known as Indian hyssop or anisomeles, is a plant species native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Anisomeles inodora include its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use in treating fever, cough, and sore throat. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or a powder for its herbal uses, which can be consumed as a tea or added to other herbal remedies.
